title: Opard Battery Fairy Lights 2 Pack 50 LEDs 5m, Christmas Lights, 8 Lighting Modes, Timer Function, IP65 Waterproof, Warm White String Lights for Christmas, Outdoor, Indoor
features: 【2 Pack Battery Fairy Lights】Each 5m string has 50 LEDs (10cm apart) and gives off a warm white glow. Perfect fairy lights battery operated for bedroom, garden, or as outdoor Christmas lights battery powered.
【8 Lighting Modes】8 light effects: Combination, Waves, Sequential, Slow Glow, Chasing, Slow Fade, Twinkle, and Steady On. Great LED Christmas lights for tree, wreath, or holiday décor.
【Timer & IP65 Waterproof】Auto timer: 6h on, 18h off. With IP65 waterproof wire, these battery operated Christmas lights are ideal for both indoor and outdoor decoration.
【Indoor & Outdoor Use】Use these battery powered fairy lights for Christmas decorations lights, bedroom, garden, or patio. Create a cozy, festive glow anywhere.
【Package & Service】Includes 2 × 5m battery fairy lights with battery box (3×AA, not included). Reliable outdoor battery Christmas lights backed by 30-day refund and 12-month warranty.
description: Product Description Battery Fairy Lights Magic in Every Corner 3 AA batteries Power Source Mains powered IP65 Waterproof Rating IP65(wire only) 5m 50LED Length & LED Count 10m 100LED 2700K Warm White Light Color 2700K Warm White Auto 6H on/18H off Timer Function 6H 8H 6639H Remote Control Christmas, bedroom Application Christmas, bedroom 3 AA batteries Power Source Mains powered IP65 Waterproof Rating IP65(wire only) 5m 50LED Length & LED Count 3.6m (Wide)-138 LEDs 2700K Warm White Light Color 2700K Warm White Auto 6H on/18H off Timer Function 6H 8H 6639H Remote Control Christmas, bedroom Application Window, curtain 3 AA batteries Power Source Mains powered IP65 Waterproof Rating IP65(wire only) 5m 50LED Length & LED Count 2m x10 200LED 2700K Warm White Light Color 2700K Warm White Auto 6H on/18H off Timer Function 6H 8H 6639H Remote Control Christmas, bedroom Application Christmas tree 3 AA batteries Power Source Mains powered IP65 Waterproof Rating IP65(wire only) 5m 50LED Length & LED Count 7.8m 200LED 2700K Warm White Light Color 5500K Cold White Auto 6H on/18H off Timer Function 6H 8H 6639H Remote Control Christmas, bedroom Application Roof edge, Balcony Previous page Plug-in Fairy Lights Learn More Christmas Window Lights Learn More Christmas Tree Lights Learn More Icicle Lights Learn More Next page What size or pack options are available? We offer three options (2700K warm white.): 1. 2-pack × 5m (50 LEDs each) – classic version. 2. 1-pack × 10m (100 LEDs) – classic version. 3. 2-pack × 5m (50 LEDs each) – embedded bulbs, for a sleeker look. Can these fairy lights be used outdoors? Yes. The lights feature IP65 waterproof protection and rust-resistant upgraded bulbs, suitable for outdoor use such as balconies or gardens. Please keep the battery box away from direct rain or water immersion. Do the lights have a timer function? To save energy, our lights include an auto timer that keeps them on for 6 hours and off for 18 hours, repeating the cycle automatically every day — no need to reset manually. Do the lights have blinking or different lighting modes? Yes, the lights offer 8 lighting modes, including blinking/flashing, wave, slow fade in/out, and steady on, creating various festive or decorative atmospheres. Are the lights safe to use around children or pets? Absolutely. The lights use low voltage and stay cool to the touch, making them safe for kids and pets.
